metadata.title: Tabor — The Bible, place by place
metadata.description: Read the Bible while an interactive map shows, in real time, where each passage takes place.

home.lede: Read the sacred text while a map travels with you, showing where each passage unfolds in its real setting.

now.title: What you'll find today
now.body: The complete text of the 73 books of the Catholic canon in two public-domain versions (Biblia Platense / Straubinger in Spanish, Catholic Public Domain Version in English). An interactive map with 1,335 biblical places synchronized with the reading. Coming soon: search, bookmarks, and reading plans.

rigor.title: Doctrinal rigor
rigor.body: Only approved versions and verified notes.

calm.title: Aesthetic calm
calm.body: No ads, no gamification, no dark patterns.

privacy.title: Privacy by design
privacy.body: Your data is yours. Optional account, anonymous telemetry.

books.title: Bible
books.lede: Seventy-three books in Catholic liturgical order. Pick one to open its chapter index.
